---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for the plugin
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What problem are you trying to solve?

Describe the use case or pain point. (e.g. "I'm building a rhythm game and need lower-latency macro execution," or "I want to handle commands without using MonoBehaviour.")

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to see — new API, new component, new sample, behavior change, etc. Code sketches or pseudo-code welcome.

## Alternatives you've considered

Other approaches you tried or thought about, and why they fall short.

## Who benefits?

- Game developers integrating Cephable
- Players using adaptive controls
- Both

## Additional context

Screenshots, links to similar features in other tools, references, or anything else that helps frame the request.

## Are you willing to contribute this?

- [ ] Yes, I'd like to submit a PR
- [ ] Yes, with guidance from a maintainer
- [ ] No, but I'm happy to test
- [ ] No
